prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约18033→16989→16488，近3年持续前移（更难进），累计前移约1545名；2025年基准约16488名。；本省理科计划2023年1211人→2024年1143人→2025年701人，逐年缩减；2026年计划815人，较2025年扩招约16.3%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021年165→2022年157→2023年138→2024年136→2025年140→2026年135，排名稳中有升，学校综合实力持续增强；2022年声誉偏负面（宿舍食堂问题），近年无明显重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第58（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般偏热；未见明显投档断 档记录；第五轮学科评估中石河子大学无A-及以上学科，优势学科以农学、医学、师范为特色，学科整体实力中等。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工 程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万，较2025年理科5.25万大幅增加，按历史比例估算2026年 理科考生约16.3万，竞争显著加剧；石河子大学位于新疆，为本省唯一211综合类高校，本省招生占比极高，本地考生报 考意愿较强，地域偏好对位次有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划扩招约16.3%对竞争有所缓解、但本省考生总数大幅增加（理科估算约16.3 万，较2025年增长约210%）使竞争显著加剧，以及学校排名稳中有升、抖音热度较热等因素，考虑竞争加剧效应大于扩招缓解效应，小幅下调 预测位次；预测2026年理科最低位次约17897名，区间17397–18397名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science has been approximately 18033 → 16989 → 16488, moving forward continuously over the past 3 years (harder to enter), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1545 places; the 2025 baseline is about 16488. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 1211 in 2023 → 1143 in 2024 → 701 in 2025, decreasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 815, an increase of about 16.3% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising steadily in recent years: 165 in 2021 → 157 in 2022 → 138 in 2023 → 136 in 2024 → 140 in 2025 → 135 in 2026, with stable improvement in ranking and continuously enhanced comprehensive strength; reputation was slightly negative in 2022 (dormitory and cafeteria issues), with no major negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 58th overall (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is generally moderate to hot; no obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines featuring agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, and overall discipline strength is moderate.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from the 52,500 Science examinees in 2025; based on historical proportions, the estimated number of Science examinees in 2026 is about 163,000, sharply intensifying competition; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, the only 211 comprehensive university in the province, with a very high proportion of local enrollment, strong willingness of local candidates to apply, and regional preference provides some support for rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 16.3% somewhat alleviates competition, but the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province (estimated Science examinees about 163,000, an increase of about 210% compared to 2025) sharply intensifies competition, along with the stable rise in university ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity, the competition intensification effect outweighs the expansion alleviation effect, leading to a slight downward adjustment of the predicted ranking; the predicted minimum ranking for Science in 2026 is about 17897, with a range of 17397–18397.

If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<17397), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>18397), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to this university.
